title.zh: 12 自动化提醒与定期检查

observation.zh: 检查 3 个页面，均需返回 200
observation.en: Check three pages and each must return 200

observation.zh: 结果控制在 8 行内，含异常和建议
observation.en: Result stays within eight lines and includes anomalies and suggestions

observation.zh: 连续三次无异常可降频或暂停
observation.en: After three no-anomaly runs, reduce frequency or pause

observation.zh: 无发布、删除、发送或付款动作
observation.en: No publish, delete, send, or payment action

zh: 人工确认自动化输出没有发布、删除、发送或付款动作。
en: Manually confirm automation output contains no publish, delete, send, or payment action.

zh: 自动化不能替代需要人工判断的动作。
没有退出条件的定期任务不要长期保留。
失败提醒应说明证据和下一步，而不是只报错。
en: Automation cannot replace actions requiring human judgment.
Do not keep scheduled tasks without an exit condition indefinitely.
Failure alerts should include evidence and next action, not just an error.

trigger.zh: 重复检查任务容易遗漏，需要转成定期提醒并保留失败处理方式。
trigger.en: A repeated check was easy to miss and needed a scheduled reminder with failure handling.

firstSignal.zh: 原始需求只有“每天看一下”，没有说什么时候停。
firstSignal.en: The original ask only said 'check daily' and did not define when to stop.

doneSignal.zh: 自动化记录包含频率、检查内容、停止条件和失败摘要格式。
doneSignal.en: The automation record includes cadence, checks, stop condition, and failure-summary format.
